emails.subject: Re: Bankers Trust/Deutsche Bank
emails.body: Re: Bankers Trust/Deutsche Bank Tana, Yesterday, Deutsche Bank faxed me a "Derivatives Novation Letter" assigning the BT trades to Deutsche Bank-London Branch, as of February 23, 2001. Attached to the novation letter is a 23 page deal by deal list of all novated deals (why they can't just say "all outstanding deals", I don't know). Should I fax this up to you? Diane From: Tana Jones@ECT on 02/27/2001 09:26 AM

emails.subject: Re: Bankers Trust/Deutsche Bank

Attached to the novation letter is a 23 page deal by deal list of all novated deals (why they can't just say "all outstanding deals", I don't know). Should I fax this up to you? Diane From: Tana Jones@ECT on 02/27/2001 09:26 AM

emails.subject: Re: Bankers Trust/Deutsche Bank
emails.body: Yes, please send this up to me. Thanks! Diane Anderson@ENRON 02/27/2001 09:31 AM
